title: Why being "eccentric" makes you look stupid

transcript.text: Okay hello this is something that I've been thinking about last couple days I think I'll
Do a video and it's uh you know I think a lot of people are like afraid to talk about new age stuff
Because it makes them look stupid or people maybe are afraid to be eccentric because it makes them
Look stupid and I think one reason why people may look stupid is because uh if people are eccentric
Is because people look at them and they they automatically think that being status quo is
What everybody wants to do so if you're not status quo then you're stupid because you don't understand
What status quo is when in reality you're eccentric because you don't want to be status quo and an
Example of that would be like say in high school you have a kid who shows up in school with bell
Bottoms and everybody uh thinks that person's stupid because uh that they think that person
Should know that bell bottoms are out of style uh when in reality that person um just just likes the
Style of bell bottoms and doesn't care that they're not in style that's you know they just like the
Style and so but maybe people would think that they're stupid because that person actually really
You know doesn't understand that bell bottoms are in style and so maybe you know they originally
Didn't like the idea that bell bottoms are out of style and then you know they started wearing
Their bell bottoms because they liked it and then they over time they forgot they actually did forget
That bell bottoms are out of style so then you know so then they look stupid they seem stupid for
Forgetting that uh maybe a better example would be like a belief um somebody say lives in a town where
There's lots of fundamentalist christians who think oh you know every if you're not a fundamentalist
Christian you'll go to hell forever so then somebody you know rejects that idea and then and then they
Have that idea so long that they forget that everybody around them believes that so then they talk to
Them as if that's not true like uh like oh yeah I'm buddhist now and then and then at a party or
Something and then they go whoa you're stupid because they forgot that all all the people in the
Town were fundamentalist christians so maybe that's another reason and then there's a second reason why
Maybe being eccentric people would think that you're stupid is that um or even if you're you know really
Like new age or you think you're stupid and that's it's this one quote that my friend actually told me
Which I think is a really cool psalm biblical psalm and it's the wisdom of man is like the deepest ocean
And the wisdom of god is like a bubbling brook and that means that uh basically that you know all of
The laws of the important laws of the universe are very simple and humans like to complicate things
Um because they I guess in order to appear intelligent they would make a really simple
Concept to uh complicate it um and one way that that you know could manifest is some somebody would
Say something that's really like eccentric really out there and then somebody says is this what you're
Saying you know they boil it down and then sometimes people get they try to they try to go well no I'm not
Saying that and they explain it but but in fact you know that is what they're saying and it's but
It's okay to just say something really straightforward and simple I guess an example of that would be like
Um you could say uh crop circles are made by aliens somebody would go are you trying to tell me crop
Circles are made by aliens and somebody might be like oh but well I mean you don't know what they're
Just made by something else and when in fact maybe you should just say yeah some of them are so
Um anyways uh so anyway yeah so like if you say something really matter-of-factly and you're just
Really simple minded but the ideas that you're saying because are just out there and but you put them
Forth simply um I guess that could make you come across as being not as smart as somebody else who
Would who would say an idea that's less correct but they would they would explain it in so like of a
Roundabout long-winded way that it kind of confuses a little bit from the original point but they seem
Smart or something um it's I think in english it's called uh double speak or wait I can't remember
What it's called but uh it's kind of like legal terms you know like people describing laws and stuff
With like way too many words and really big words just to sometimes maybe just to confuse people
Um when when it's possible to just say it more matter-of-factly so anyways um that's one cool
Thing about fundamentalist christians is they they do have the courage to just say stuff matter-of-factly
And that's cool about them but I try to do that I try to just say stuff matter-of-factly you know
Uh so
